name: Escape Maze
description: Escape Maze is a sleek and immersive 2D maze puzzle game that challenges your logic, focus, and sense of direction. Guide a glowing white cube through beautifully designed top-down mazes, navigating tight paths, misleading routes, and clever dead ends to reach the hidden exit. With smooth touch and mouse controls, the game is optimised for both mobile and desktop play, offering a seamless experience across all devices. Each level features a fresh background color, subtle flying particle effects, and progressively harder maze layouts that keep the game play unpredictable and engaging.There’s no timer success depends purely on precision.......
instructions: Tap the arrow on the cube to choose a direction The cube will automatically move until it hits a wall or reaches a new junction Works on both mobile and desktop
